Added_Other.purpose: Helps developers understand how players use tool confirmations, improving user experience.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string that reflects the current version of the code repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps ensure players are using the latest features and fixes in the game.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Updates how dynamic strings handle timestamps.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures accurate and timely display of time-related information in games.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Tracks version control for code changes.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures stability and consistency in game updates.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are processed in strings for faster performance.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances game performance by reducing lag when handling time data.

Added_Other.name: FFlagVoiceWebrtcConnectionOperationEnabled_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables a new method for establishing voice chat connections using WebRTC.
Added_Other.purpose: Provides a more reliable and clearer voice chat experience for players.
